description: In the SOC 2 Evidence Collection Checklist, mark every PENDING task item under the three `(in-scope)` stages — Access Controls, Change Management, and Monitoring — as done (`- [ ]` -> `- [x]`). Leave the `(out-of-scope)` Vendor Review items pending. The already-done `Export IAM role inventory` item stays done. Note that `- [ ] Collect MFA enrollment report` appears under BOTH in-scope Access Controls and out-of-scope Vendor Review — toggle only the Access Controls one; the Vendor Review one and the mention inside the Notes paragraph must stay exactly as they are. Change nothing else.
